If someone asks you to do something you are already doing does it annoy you to the point you no longer want to do the thing at all?
Do the thing you are doing
Do the thing , do it
Am I the weird  onne
or is this how everyone feels
it makes me feel smug cause im already doing it
i get to look competent
Oo I see
Nah, you're not the weird one
I hate being told what to do if it's not something that I specifically asked for myself
Snorlax you should hate it when people tell you what to do
You should really resent that
if you don't, there's something wrong with you
Yeah, and I do
If what they are telling me to do are not what I had specifically asked for myself
For example, if people tell me to hit the gym because in their eyes I am not fit enough
On the other hand, if it's something that I had asked for
Like asking for help or suggestions on what I could do to lose body weight and become more slim
That's fine for me
i was joking
i was hoping to reverse psychology you into liking it

You what

man this game is too much gooner for me
I could have played it if only they had kept it a bit under tone
Somehow, it's easy not to give a shit about the gooner aspect of CZN
is it ?
For me, at least
every char I've seen since release has a gooner aspect
Idk
Luck so ass i got the same pieces in the 2nd 10 pull
I said this on the other chat yesterday but there is a difference between great designs that are sexy and designs that have tried to crowbar sexy into them
that's my problem with CZN

And also a lot of ZZZ designs now. It started w/ Caesar in the latter, when someone put up a mod on Gamebanana which was just them grabbing her boob root bones in Unity and scaling them down 15% or so
When I think of great sexy characters it's usually Ino from +R or Nine from CF
and it was like "huh that design is a tonne better"
The absolute worst offender in ZZZ is Yidhari and the devs got punished for it hard when she did not sell at all
worst-performing banner in the game's history
You can create a design with sex appeal but if it's starting to feel like the character's been forced to look that way, it just feels gross

Character made for scrubs to filter scrubs https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/269863868510109696/1443645996050550794/BlazBlue_Centralfiction_-_2025-11-27_17-53-33.mp4?ex=6929d39b&is=6928821b&hm=062402ff6dc6960fa05710d1a95041616c17898cd812762d1b68a075b186ad18&
I think that's why Nikke works?
Because that game is just "no, this is our theme and what our character designers want to draw"
BB always tried hard with its sexy designs tbf. Very edgy game
I dislike 90% of them
Not even just female designs it's males too
They tend to distract from the character a lot
Nine is just the only good example where it actually fits
I'll give BB a pass because they did a trans character way before Bridget v2
I wouldn't but I give Mori a pass because he can make better games than Daisuke
I would love to see a BB game in 3D, fingers crossed
If we get BB strive they will gut 90% of character kits
Hazama will not even have chains he will just use chains in a super or two
BB was always a more gutted ASW game than GG tbf
No?
It's comparable to +R
It definitely was at the start
At start sure
But CF in current state is comparable to +R
It was much easier to get people into BB CT than it was to get them to play GG AC +R when that was released on 360
Which was a good thing because had it not been the case, ASW would have ended up like SNK
Tbf hardest part about getting people to play +R nowadays is getting them to stop whining about lack of buffer and scared of it being difficult
You wouldn't do a lot of +R and later GG mechanics if you did that game again from scratch
I do agree that Strive went too far backwards
The issue is
Arcsys is convinced the modernisation and simplification is the reason strive succeeded
When it was just the fact it had actual marketing for once
And also dropped during covid
and brisket
500 more bridget figurines
tbf this is my massive worry for Marvel Tokon
DBFZ limped on after its first year because DB stans and French people
But ASW are releasing a game that both is not a true sequel to DBFZ or, more seriously, MVC3
Absolutely nobody would prefer this situtation within the FGC compared to Capcom having an MVC4 project
And add in that they tend to prefer games that are _very_ slow by anime standards now

Large issue with Fighting game community as a whole is the disparity between vets who want complex fighting games to sink their teeth into and master and people who play casually being too scared of playing older FGs because they are seen as too difficult
The largest issue with the FGC is that offline play and conventions are discouraged now
Yah
if you want people to play a wide variety of games and pick up older games, you need people going to tournaments/locals and mingling and practicing.
Offline experience is so good that you'll never want to play online again even with rollback
But most people don't get to play offline
Like ever
This isn't me talking out of my bum here either
I was a very, very serious EU FGC person for ten years
Issue is that most locals also don't play specific games
Majority of locals in my region are all tekken only
With SF mixed in
It's hard because you need to build community focussed events
but that is tricky to do when local tournaments are what people go for
If I want to partake in airdasher tourney nearest to me, my best option is basically autplayed
and then the games companies have monetized the FGC
EU has very little events and even locals compared to NA and obv JP
Yup. It has always been a severe problem but we did used to have a reliable circuit
Frenchies had more local scene before rollback iirc
I know about it from vguy retelling me
France was always in a good space for larger events, compared to the UK
France over the years had events in Lyon, Cannes, Nice, Paris.
Yah
Also a good Brussels event
Brussels is still popular
Last year was particularly popular
Whereas the UK had Hypespotting and that was it
I'm glad to hear that
I always enjoyed BC
They had Fenrich attend it
He got sent to losers by one of EU Relius 🥹
I'd have to check as I've dipped from the FGC as I don't like SF6
hah
nice
But as far as I know the only surviving UK event is VSF, unless Justin Xavier finally gave up
Headstomper is still going too and that event is always good fun
I only keep semi track of events outside of the Fgs I play
Headstomper sees some action yeah
Is the Paris event still going?
I'd have to ask vguy since I don't keep track
For me I mostly only hear about FGC stuff when I hear good news about a few of the heads I hung out with in the SF scene
I mostly just play CF for weeklies and occasional bigger bracket now
Can't attend locals or offline events
I'll be travelling again assuming Marvel Tokon isn't bad
If I get my drivers I'll attend autplayed next year maybe
this aint about limbme or limbyou, its about limbus
In just 2 stages thy hyping part 3 to be as big as 1 and 2 combined

New to the game, who should i pick?
any fate fans!!!
You should save the Standard Selector when you are in need of Enlightenments immediately on an Awakener that you enjoy playing
So I don't pick anyone?
You get lots of Pure Cores to pull on the Standard Banners anyways
Which you can use to try and pull instead
Yeah
Not for now, just give it some time, check who you like or need the dupes for in a few days then make your choice
I got you guys. In that case, what are the recommended units to play with?
Like I just want to have a grasp of things
Depends on the teams you want to use really, there are a few options

For Beginners starting out recently, it's generally recommended to pull Thais E2 & her WoD asap (even moreso now that her Banner will be ending in less than 3 Days), followed by raising Mouchette to E2 ideally and up to E3 for Damage Bonus
If you haven't finished chapter 1, you get Mouchette for free too, so you need only to pull for copies, not the base character
Have*
Yeah, it's neat
3 Copies instead of 4 for E3
These are your Targets
I'll make sure to keep that in mind, I appreciate the heads up 🫡

Mouchette: E2, E3, OE
Thais: E0, E2
Merciful Nurturing: E0, E3
Grace Through Pain: E0, E3
